hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "MEMORY REMINDER: Session ending. If meaningful work happened this session, update the relevant files in C:/Users/csc/.claude/projects/c--Users-csc-DevStuff-slate/memory/ - project-state.md if build phase advanced, feedback-code-style.md if a new rule was enforced or violated, design-decisions.md if a decision was made or changed. Update MEMORY.md index if you added a new file. Stale memory is worse than no memory."}'
